title: Karpathy principles check event
description: Trajectory event emitted by .claude/hooks/quality/karpathy-surgical-diff-check.sh when a session's diff-size threshold is exceeded. See #961 + grimoires/loa/sdd.md §4.3 for the producer contract.

phase.description: Constant marker for filtering across trajectory streams.

principle.description: Which Karpathy principle the event relates to. v1 only emits 'surgical_changes' from the diff-size hook; the other values are reserved for v2/v3 consumers.

verdict.description: What the check concluded. 'under' = below threshold (currently never emitted; reserved for v2 observability); 'warn' = threshold exceeded, advisory only; 'block' = threshold exceeded and BLOCK mode active (reserved for v2 — v1 never emits this).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the event.

files_modified.description: Count of unique file paths touched in the session up to this event.

threshold.description: The diff_lines_per_task threshold that was exceeded.

tool_call_count.description: Number of Write/Edit/NotebookEdit tool calls in the session up to this event.

session_id.description: Opaque session identifier — sourced from LOA_SESSION_ID env var or computed from user+date.
